name: PLAYSTUDIOS, Inc.
business: PLAYSTUDIOS is a developer of free-to-play casual games for mobile and social platforms. We generate revenue primarily through the sale of in-game virtual currency and the monetization of player engagement. Our game portfolio includes a diverse range of titles, from social casino to card games and puzzle games.

exposures.sentence: PLAYSTUDIOS is a developer of free-to-play casual games for mobile and social platforms.

catalysts.sentence: We launched Tetris Block Party in December 2025
and The Win Zone in January 2026
